name: Milky Way Wonder Cake
recipeIngredient: 6 Regular-size (or 13 individual-size) Milky Way candy bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the Milky Way candy bars with 1 stick of butter, stirring frequently until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
3. Beat the remaining stick of butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir together flour and baking soda, then add to the butter alternately with buttermilk, mixing just until dry ingredients are moistened.
6. Blend in the cooled Milky Way mixture, vanilla, and nuts.
7. Pour into a greased and floured Bundt pan or 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until the top springs back when touched lightly and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan and cooling on a wire rack.
